name: Mikoto Aiura
description: __ Height:__ 166 cm Aiura is a gyaru soothsayer, or someone who is able to foresee the future. She is another love-interest of Kusuo's and transfers to PK Academy upon reading her own fortune and learning that her "Mr. Right" would be there. After witnessing him save Yumehara Chiyo from a possibly deadly fall, she deduces that Kusuo is the one she's been looking for. name: Suletta Mercury

name: Makoto Kino
description: Makoto is the third member of the Sailor Team to be discovered by Sailor Moon, and serves as the "muscles" of the group. In addition to being physically tough, she is able to manipulate electricity and uses some plant-based powers. Her friends rarely use her full given name, normally shortening it to Mako-chan.

name: Nonon Jakuzure
description: Nonon Jakuzure is one of the main characters in Kill la Kill and one of the Student Council's Elite Four. She regulates the school's non-athletic groups, such as the gardening and biology clubs. Nonon also runs the school's Rakugo Club, 100 Poems by 100 Poets Club and most likely the marching band. Nonon's Three-Star Goku Uniform resembles that of a drum majorette. After meeting Mokkun, Masahiro regained his spirit sight and embraced his destiny as an Onmyōji in service to the emperor.
